he 4th degree of
Vrsabha. you should not think that the Sun is in the 2nd house
from the Moon. He should be considered to be in the first
house itself. The Sun produces good effects when he passes in
transit through the 3rd, 6th, 10th and 1 !th houses from the Moon.
So the effects of his transit through the other house are to be
understood to be bad. Similarly Mars. Saturn, Rahu and Ketu
produce good effects only in the 3rd. 6th and 11 th houses from
the Moon. The Moon is beneficial in L 3, 6, 7, 10 and II places
from herself. Mercury is auspicious in 2, 4, 6, 8, 10 and 11 places
from the Moon. Jupiter is good in 2, 5, 7, 9 and 11 places.
Venus is favourable in 1, 2. 3, 4, 5, 8, 9, 11 and 12 places.
Generally the nine planets beginning with the Sun take respect-
ively the following periods to pass through a Rasi : (1) 1
month; (2) 2' days; (3) 2 months; (4) 1 month; (5) 1 year;
(6) 1 month; (7) 2.1 years: (8) and (9) l| years. Though
a planet is expected to produce its efTects.
